result.summary: Brex exposes REST APIs (Team, Expenses, Accounting) on https://api.brex.com plus a Brex MCP server at https://api.brex.com/mcp; auth is via Brex-issued user/API tokens or partner OAuth, with MCP also supporting OAuth discovery and API-key bearer auth.

brex_api_token.label: Brex API token
brex_api_token.setup: Go to [Settings → Developer](https://dashboard.brex.com/settings/developer) in the Brex Dashboard as an account admin or card admin. Click **Create Token**, name it, choose the needed scopes, and allow access. Copy the token once and store it securely; Brex says it won’t be shown again.

brex_oauth_session.label: Brex OAuth session for MCP
brex_oauth_session.setup: Connect an MCP client to the Brex MCP server at `https://api.brex.com/mcp`. The client will use Brex's OAuth flow automatically via the discovery endpoint `https://api.brex.com/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp`; no separate token registration is needed. Authorize with your Brex account in the browser prompt.

brex_oauth_partner.label: Brex partner OAuth app
brex_oauth_partner.setup: For Brex developer partners, contact [Brex developer support](https://developer.brex.com/guides/support/) to be issued a client ID and client secret. Register your redirect URI(s) with Brex, then use the Authorization Code Grant against `https://accounts-api.brex.com/oauth2/default` (or the legacy `https://accounts.brex.com` if already migrated).
